case_title: MOHAMED M MOHAMED VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY MOHAMED, MOHAMED M AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MOHAMED M. MOHAMED IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JULIE MOORE, CONSUMER CLAIMS ANALYST. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS UP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - MOHAMED M MOHAMED; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-11-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMED, MOHAMED M ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
